dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8015 IH: Incentivizing Cooperation in Immigration Enforcement Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Mace introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968 to provide for priority consideration for certain grants for applicants who have entered into section 287(g) agreements.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Incentivizing Cooperation in Immigration Enforcement Act.

section.header: Priority consideration for certain grant applicants
section.text: Section 1701(c) of the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968 (34 U.S.C. 10381(c)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2)(C), by striking or at the end;
in paragraph (3)(B), by striking the period and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following:

from an applicant in a State, or a political subdivision of a State, that has entered into a written agreement with the Secretary of Homeland Security pursuant to section 287(g) of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1357(g)).
